memory.summary: My plan to analyze the assignment conflicts with our group lunch; I must renegotiate the timing to prioritize our social connection.

desires: Secure a renegotiated time slot with cohort_3 for our lunch that doesn't jeopardize the trust I've built over the semester.
Ensure the analysis section of my assignment is submitted by 18:00 so I don't have to scramble and look disorganized in front of professor prof_assignment tomorrow.

goals.description: Confirm lunch plans with cohort_3 now to lock in the time slot and protect our semester-long trust.
goals.rationale: My affiliation axis demands I prioritize relationship maintenance over task completion. Losing this social bond would cost more than a minor delay in my assignment submission, so securing the meeting immediately is non-negotiable.

goals.description: Complete the analysis section of the assignment before leaving for lunch to ensure I can submit it by 18:00 without scrambling.
goals.rationale: While the professor's trust matters (assertive), my deliberate planning horizon means I won't sacrifice the quality of our social interaction or risk burnout just to finish this soft-hardness task early. I'll handle this after we've connected.

agent.last_reasoning: Affiliation priority dictates locking in the lunch slot immediately to protect our bond. While g2 (assignment) is deferred, I'll briefly finish the soft analysis task before leaving to ensure I don't need to scramble later, balancing relationship maintenance with minimal task disruption.

action.name: message

args.content: 저는 지금 도서관에서 분석 부분만 20분 더 빠르게 다듬고, 바로 점심으로 갈게요. 약속을 지키기 위해 조금 늦게 오지만, 함께 먹으러 꼭 올 거예요.
